In addition, we have contributed Rs. 15 million towards the country’s urgent national recovery efforts, which was formally handed over to Prime Minister Dr. Harini Amarasuriya on 8 December 2025.

We remain committed to helping communities in Sri Lanka recover and rebuild.

Project HOPE: Phase 02 with Sri Lanka Red Cross 

Moments from Project Hope, Phase 02, as Kelly Felder delivered our second consecutive clothing donation to the Sri Lanka Red Cross in aid of the flood affected families.

For the community, with love! Hope stitched into every piece. ✨

#projecthope
#kellyfelder

Update: The donations are officially concluded. Thank you all for your generosity!

Sri Lanka, let’s rise together.
